cases.description: Slack custom emoji request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: make me a custom Slack emoji — a spinning coffee cup
expectations: Uses FPS 10-30 and limits colors to 48-128 for file size

cases.description: Slack message GIF request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a 480x480 animated GIF showing progress bar filling up
expectations: Uses easing functions for smooth animation
Validates output size against Slack constraints

cases.prompt: animate a rocket launch for our #deploys channel
expectations: Uses PIL primitives (circles, polygons) or frame composition

cases.description: Static image request does NOT trigger slack-gif-creator
cases.prompt: design a logo for a coffee shop
expectations: Does NOT produce an animated GIF

cases.description: Generative p5.js art does NOT trigger slack-gif-creator
cases.prompt: create a flow-field generative art sketch
